title: The Hottentot
writer: Del Andrews, William Collier Sr., Tay Garnett
actors: Douglas MacLean, Madge Bellamy, Lila Leslie
plot: A young man happens to have the same name as a famous steeplechase jockey, and when he finds out that people keep mistaking him for the jockey (even though he's never been on a horse in his life and is actually terrified of them), he
